nasb.text: Joseph made it a statute concerning the land of Egypt valid to this day, that Pharaoh should have the fifth; only the land of the priests did not become Pharaoh’s.

esv.text: So Joseph made it a statute concerning the land of Egypt, and it stands to this day, that Pharaoh should have the fifth; the land of the priests alone did not become Pharaoh’s.

cnv.text: 於是，約瑟為埃及的田地立了一個法例，直到今日還有效，就是五分之一歸給法老；只有祭司的田地不歸給法老。

ccb.text: 于是，约瑟立下一条法令，到今天还有效，就是埃及出产的五分之一归给法老。只有祭司的田地不归法老。

csbs.text: 于是约瑟为埃及的地立下定例，直到今日还有效，就是地上收成的五分之一归法老；唯独祭司的地不归法老。
